Apps
Built to automate.
Accountability
TAG

Team Accountability Gateway. Manages call-outs, infractions, corrective actions, and recognition — with role-based access, electronic signatures, and PDF generation built in.

In Development
↗
Team Tools
FieldSync

Mobile coordination software for shared check-ins, lightweight planning, offline-first access, knowledge bases, and request tracking — built for teams that move.

In Development
↗
Browser Extension
Construe

Context-aware acronym and jargon lookup for the browser. Pinnable fields, a six-tier resolution chain, and multi-level explanations — built to eliminate tab-switching and assumption.

Active
↗
Document Builder
PageSmith

A browser-based builder for branded briefs, specs, and shareable documents. Compose reusable blocks, apply TACTAG or custom themes, then export to HTML, PDF, DOCX, TXT, or email-ready markup.

Active
↗
Automation
Automations

A growing suite of Node.js and Python-based automation pipelines for document generation, data cleanup, publishing, and repeatable handoffs.

Active

About
One dev.
Deliberate tools.

TACTAG is a solo developer brand focused on building utility-first applications for people turning messy routines into clean systems — anyone who's tired of tools that weren't made for them.

Every app under the TACTAG umbrella starts with a real problem. The goal isn't feature parity with enterprise software — it's precision. Tools that do exactly what they need to do, and nothing they don't.

Stack of choice: Node.js, Python, React, Firebase — with a strong preference for automation over repetition, and local-first over vendor lock-in.
